case_title: AUBURN PACIFIC GROUP LLC VS. ERIN BROOKS et al

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ERIN BROOKS'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: SUSTAINED IN PART AND OVERRULED IN PART. PURSUANT TO C.C.P. SECTION 1061, THE COURT SUSTAINS THE DEMURRER AS THE PARTIES' DISPUTE AS TO THEIR RESPECTIVE RIGHTS AND DUTIES UNDER THE AGREEMENT, THE PET AGREEMENT AND THE RENT ORDINANCE WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. THE COURT OVERRULES THE DEMURRER AS TO THE PARTIES' DISPUTE AS TO THE USE OF THE REAR YARD, THE STORAGE AREA AND REMOVAL OF DEFENDANT'S PERSONAL PROPERTY AND THE PARKING OF DEFENDANT'S MOTOR SCOOTER. TEN DAYS TO ANSWER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600
